mapper.select:
SELECT q.*, qa.analysis_status, qa.aggression_score FROM questions q LEFT JOIN question_ai_analysis qa ON q.question_id = qa.question_id
q.delete_yn='N'
AND q.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND q.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND q.status=#{status}
AND q.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate},'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND q.created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY q.question_id DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions
delete_yn='N'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND status=#{status}
AND created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate},'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions
member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE status = 'ANSWERED' AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT q.*, qa.analysis_status, qa.aggression_score FROM questions q LEFT JOIN question_ai_analysis qa ON q.question_id = qa.question_id WHERE q.question_id = #{questionId} AND q.delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT question_id, parent_id, member_id, category, title, content, status, is_public, delete_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM questions
delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(#{createdAt})
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT q.*, qa.analysis_status, qa.aggression_score FROM questions q LEFT JOIN question_ai_analysis qa ON q.question_id = qa.question_id
q.member_id = #{memberId} AND q.delete_yn = 'N'
AND q.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND q.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY q.question_id DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT question_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO questions (question_id, parent_id, member_id, category, title, content, is_public, delete_yn) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{parentId}, #{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPublic}, #{deleteYn})
mapper.update:
UPDATE questions SET delete_yn='Y' WHERE question_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT q.*, qa.analysis_status, qa.aggression_score FROM questions q LEFT JOIN question_ai_analysis qa ON q.question_id = qa.question_id WHERE q.parent_id = #{parentId} AND q.category = 'MEETUP' AND q.delete_yn = 'N' AND q.is_public = 'Y' AND ( qa.analysis_status IS NULL OR qa.analysis_status = 'NORMAL' ) ORDER BY q.question_id DESC
